creator: wenheping@gmail.com
text:
Front is an easy to use, visually attractive, 
SCORM compatible, eLearning and Human Capital 
Development system.

eFront is easy to use, visually attractive,
technologically advanced, has intergrated 
pedagogical concepts, and eFront is open source.

eFront includes a wide variety of components 
that help you create your lesson structure and 
add content, build online-tests, communicate with 
thers, track users history and progress, conduct 
surveys, assign projects, and create certifications. 
And this list just scratches the surface of the system

WWW:   http://www.efrontlearning.net/
